sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75707" key="o)to/stullos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀτόστυλλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, a plant, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:161" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">161</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
